name: session-insights
description: Per-session work metrics for Claude Code: PostToolUse + Stop hooks roll up tool calls, turns, files touched, a size class (XS–XL) and a work category per session, viewable with `session-insights report` and optionally logged as a dated note to an Obsidian vault. Inspired by Devin Session Insights. Subscription-native (two hooks + bundled Rust binary, no API key).
